---
# Direction class counts (cidr list matching)

**Dataset**: `gx_10_conn` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

IP / CIDR matching with incidr and the is_* address helpers. Direction class counts. the `is_*` address helpers return a boolean (false, not null, on non-match); `count_distinct()` is the distinct-count (never `dcount`); `if(c, a, b)` classifies inline (nest for multi-branch; `case` does not exist).

```sql
dataset = gx_10_conn | filter is_ipv4(src_ip) = true and is_ipv4(dst_ip) = true | alter src_priv = is_known_private_ipv4(src_ip), dst_priv = is_known_private_ipv4(dst_ip) | alter direction = if(src_priv = true and dst_priv = true, "internal-internal", if(src_priv = true and dst_priv = false, "internal-external", if(src_priv = false and dst_priv = true, "external-internal", "external-external"))) | comp count() as conns, count_distinct(dst_ip) as distinct_dsts by direction | sort desc conns
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 3). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
